components.name: web
components.label: build-web
components.tail:
Clean — only `.env.example` exists, `.env` is gitignored. The build is complete and verified.

Here's what was built:

**Routes (10 pages matching the spec):**
| Route | Component |
|---|---|
| `/login` | LoginPage with `<LoginForm>` + `<LogoHeader>` |
| `/` | MarketplaceFeed with `<ListingGrid>`, `<CategoryFilter>`, `<SearchBar>`, `<PriceRangeSlider>` |
| `/listings/[id]` | ListingDetail with `<ListingImages>`, `<ListingInfo>`, `<SellerCard>`, `<ContactButton>` |
| `/listings/new` | CreateListing with `<ListingForm>` + `<ImageUploader>` |
| `/listings/[id]/edit` | EditListing with pre-populated `<ListingForm>` |
| `/conversations` | ConversationList with `<ConversationItem>` + `<ConversationStatusBadge>` |
| `/conversations/[id]` | ConversationThread with `<MessageList>`, `<MessageComposer>`, `<CallButton>`, `<ListingContextCard>` |
| `/admin/users` | AdminUsers with `<UserTable>` + `<BanToggle>` |
| `/admin/moderation` | AdminModeration with `<FlaggedConversations>` + `<RemoveListingButton>` |
| `*` | 404 NotFound |

**Key details:**
- Full RBAC: pages gate by role (seller-only create, admin-only user management, admin+mod moderation); `<Navbar>` shows role-aware links
- Auth stored in `localStorage` via `AuthContext`; 401 responses auto-redirect to `/login`
- `<CometChatProvider>` is a no-op placeholder — wired in the integration phase
- `<CallButton>` shows an info toast stub (CometChat Call SDK not yet integrated)
- Playwright smoke test at `e2e/login.spec.ts` covers buyer/seller/admin login + invalid-credentials + unauthenticated redirect
- Secrets: only `.env.example` committed; `.env` gitignored
- `npm run build` → ✅ clean · `tsc --noEmit` → ✅ zero errors

components.name: mobile
components.label: build-mobile
components.tail:
The mobile component is built and verified. Here's a summary of what was delivered:

---

## mkt-mobile — Baseline Complete

**Build gate:** `npx expo export --platform ios` → clean bundle (3.31 MB HBC, 0 TypeScript errors)

### Structure
| Layer | Files |
|---|---|
| `src/api/` | `client.ts` (Axios + AsyncStorage auth interceptor), `auth.ts`, `listings.ts`, `conversations.ts`, `users.ts` |
| `src/context/` | `AuthContext.tsx` (login/logout, JWT + CometChat token storage), `ThemeContext.tsx` |
| `src/navigation/` | `RootNavigator` → `AuthStack` or `AppTabs` (role-gated bottom tabs) |
| `src/screens/` | All 9 screens from spec: Login, Feed, ListingDetail, ConversationList, ConversationThread, Call, CreateListing, Profile, AdminDashboard |
| `src/components/` | All spec components: ListingFlatList, CategoryChips, SearchInput, ImageCarousel, PriceLabel, SellerRow, ContactFAB, ConversationRow, UnreadBadge, MessageBubble, ComposerBar, CallIconButton, StatCard, QuickActionList, AvatarUpload, RoleBadge, PrimaryButton, LogoImage |

### Key RBAC wiring
- **Sell tab** visible only to `seller` / `admin`
- **Admin tab** visible only to `admin` / `moderator`
- `ContactFAB` (Message Seller) shown only to `buyer` on listings they don't own

### CometChat readiness (no imports, added later)
- `cometchat_auth_token` is stored in AsyncStorage after login
- Call buttons trigger a placeholder alert (ready to wire to Call SDK)
- Conversation thread is ready for SDK channel replacement

### E2E
`e2e/login.flow.yaml` — Maestro flow: launch → assert login screen → enter `bob.buyer@mkt.test` / `Mkt@seed2026!` → tap Sign In → assert `Marketplace` feed visible
